name: Globe
summary: An interactive 3D globe visualization powered by Cobe library featuring rotating Earth with customizable markers, connections, and visual styling for geographical data presentation.
detailedDescription: The Globe component provides an interactive 3D Earth visualization using the Cobe rendering library, creating stunning geographical displays for global data, user distributions, or international presence. The globe rotates smoothly with user-controlled interaction allowing visitors to spin and explore different regions. Customizable markers can be placed at specific latitude/longitude coordinates representing offices, users, data centers, or geographically distributed information. Animated connection lines visualize routes, relationships, or data flow across continents. WebGL rendering ensures smooth 60fps performance even with multiple markers and connections. Visual customization includes globe color, marker styles, line colors, rotation speed, and size controls. Perfect for SaaS companies showing global reach, logistics platforms displaying routes, or applications requiring geographical context. The component is responsive and scales appropriately across screen sizes while maintaining visual fidelity.
purpose: Visualize global data and user distributions in engaging 3D format
Display geographical connections and networks between locations
Create impressive hero sections for companies with global operations
Provide interactive geographical context for location-based analytics
Enhance credibility with professional globe visualization
behavior: Automatically rotates on Y-axis with configurable speed
Responds to mouse drag and touch for manual rotation
Renders markers at specified latitude/longitude coordinates
Draws animated connection lines between marker points
Adjusts marker sizes based on data values
visualCharacteristics: Three-dimensional spherical Earth with depth perception
Smooth continuous rotation creating dynamic visualization
Customizable color schemes matching brand identity
Clean, modern aesthetic with minimal visual clutter
Professional appearance suitable for enterprise contexts
Interactive elements responding to user exploration
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
